name: Shrimp in Indian Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp. Rinse well and pat dry.
2. Heat butter in a skillet and add onion. Add chili. Cook briefly.
3. Add shrimp, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring often, about three minutes.
4. Stir in cardamom, cumin, lime juice, sour cream, and yoghurt.
5. Bring to gentle boil and stir. Sprinkle with coriander.
6. Serve hot with saffron rice.
